message:
🐛 Reduce flickering by adding presentation mode + backoff to cache layer (#780)

The unified cache layer was causing excessive UI flickering because:
1. It ignored presentation mode, polling at full speed (15-60s intervals)
2. Failed requests retried at the same rate, creating retry storms

This fix:
- Respects presentation mode with 5x slower refresh (min 5 minutes)
- Adds exponential backoff on consecutive failures (2^n multiplier)
- Caps backoff at 10 minutes max
- Restarts interval timer when failure count changes

When cluster is unreachable, instead of hammering every 15-60s, the
cache now backs off: 30s → 60s → 2m → 4m → 8m → 10m (capped).
In presentation mode, it starts at 5m minimum.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
